title: Garrot Hunger Bar
description:
This pack turns the regular meat hunger bar icon to golden carrots. Faithful to the in-game golden carrot texture.
Compatible with AppleSkin.
body:
# Make your hunger bars Golden-Carrot themed!
![hunger bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad1b7ab2f228ae756e527848af89cc394ea198e2.png)

- [appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) compatible
- [farmer's delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) compatible
- compatible with every minecraft version


<details>
<summary>hunger bar when debuffed</summary>

![debuffed hunger bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/440e0c77e1deecf9cdfd53f1dcd5abf3905f9968.png)

</details>
